items.title: Grim houdt zich nog op de vlakte over vertrek Pasveer naar Heracles
items.summary: Remko Pasveer is op weg naar Heracles Almelo, maar Ajax-trainer Fred Grim wilde inhoudelijk nog niet op de zaak ingaan. Dat doet hij pas als de clubs het hebben bevestigd en dat is nog niet gebeurd.

items.title: England on course for fifth Champions League spot
items.summary: Could the Premier League get an extra place in the Champions League again? This is how it looks at the end of the league phase.

items.title: Griekse media uitzinnig: 'Johan Cruijff Arena klonk als Karaiskakis'
items.summary: Griekse media komen woensdagavond superlatieven tekort voor de kwalificatie van Olympiakos voor de tussenronde van de Champions League. In Amsterdam versloegen de Grieken Ajax ( 1-2 ) en dat werd in eigen land met lovende krantenkoppen beloond.

items.title: Champions League knockout phase play-off draw: All you need to know
items.summary: The Champions League league phase is over - we know eight teams heading for the last 16, but who now has two extra games in their schedules for the right to join them, and who will they play?

items.title: Zelfs Mourinho stomverbaasd door apotheose: 'Dacht dat ik alles had meegemaakt'
items.summary: Anatoliy Trubin heeft zichzelf woensdagavond een plekje in de roemruchte Champions League-geschiedenis verschaft. De Oekraïense doelman kopte Benfica tegen Real Madrid diep in de blessuretijd naar de tussenronde van het miljardenbal .

items.title: Copy of Champions League: Chelsea knock out Napoli; Benfic...
items.summary: Joao Pedro scored twice as Chelsea claimed a top-eight finish. Elsewhere, Benfica goalkeeper Anatoliy Trubin headed a late goal to send Jose Mourinho's side through.

items.title: Grim deelt frustraties over tweede helft: 'Dat moet echt anders'
items.summary: Tegen Telstar en Go Ahead Eagles kwam het al voor en ook in het duel met Olympiakos Piraeus kwam Ajax behoorlijk anders uit de kleedkamer, na een goede eerste helft. Interim-trainer Fred Grim deelde zijn frustraties op het persmoment na de wedstrijd.

items.title: Schouten en Mulder blikken terug op CL-seizoen PSV: 'Tegen Union waren ze er niet'
items.summary: Jerdy Schouten blikte na de uitschakeling van PSV in de Champions League terug op de competitiefase. De aanvoerder voelde dat er meer in had gezeten tegen Union Sint-Gillis, Olympiakos en Newcastle United.

items.title: USMNT's Tillman nets 2 as Bayer book playoff spot
items.summary: United States midfielder Malik Tillman scored an unusual though smart goal to give Bayer Leverkusen an early lead in the Champions League against Villarreal on Wednesday, then added a second to make it 2-0.

items.title: Madrid, PSG drop to UCL playoffs in chaotic finale...
items.summary: Real Madrid were stunningly dumped into the qualifying playoffs of the Champions League by former coach Jose Mourinho on Wednesday and will be joined there by Paris Saint-Germain.

items.title: Chelsea clinch top 8 with win, eliminate Napoli
items.summary: João Pedro led a Chelsea fightback that saw them through to the Champions League last 16 with two second-half goals to beat Napoli 3-2 at the Diego Maradona Stadium.

items.title: GK goal sinks Madrid, sends Benfica to playoffs
items.summary: Benfica stunned Real Madrid with a 4-2 win, knocking the LaLiga giants out of the top eight and securing their own playoff spot.

items.title: Antetokounmpo preparing to leave Milwaukee as Bucks listen to trade offers
items.summary: Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo is preparing to ‌say farewell to the franchise with which he has spent his entire NBA career as the team listen to trade offers for him, according to ESPN.

items.title: Champions League: Benfica keeper’s last-gasp header sends side into playoffs
items.summary: Anatoliy Trubin scores dramatic goal against Real Madrid Barça and Sporting in last 16, Bodø/Glimt make playoffs Goalkeeper Anatoliy Trubin scored a 98th-minute header as Benfica defeated Real Madrid 4-2 to secure a Champions League knockout place on Wednesday and deny their opponents an automatic spot in the last 16. Benfica were heading out despite leading 3-2 with seconds of stoppage time remaining before Trubin met a free-kick to score the goal they needed to get into the playoff round on goal difference. Continue reading...

items.title: Arsenal complete perfect league with narrow win over Kairat
items.summary: First-half goals from Viktor Gyokeres, Kai Havertz and Gabriel Martinelli give Arsenal a 3-2 win over Kairat to completing a perfect league phase for the Gunners with eight victories in eight games.

items.title: Liverpool march into last 16 with six-goal Qarabag thrashing
items.summary: Liverpool thrash Qarabag 6-0 to automatically reach the last 16 of the Champions League.

items.title: Watch Benfica keeper score stoppage-time goal against Real Madrid
items.summary: Goalkeeper Anatoliy Trubin scores in the 98th minute to give Benfica a 4-2 win over Real Madrid - a goal which also secured Jose Mourinho's side a place in the last 16 play-offs of the Champions League on goal difference.

items.title: Joao Pedro magic fires Chelsea into round of 16 with Napoli win
items.summary: Two sublime strikes from Joao Pedro fired Chelsea into the Champions League round of 16 as they finished sixth in the league phase table after a 3-2 win at Napoli.

items.title: Pedro scores superb double to give Chelsea top eight finish
items.summary: Joao Pedro scores twice as Chelsea beat Napoli 3-2 to secure automatic qualification into the last 16 of the UEFA Champions League.

items.title: João Pedro’s double dumps out Napoli as Chelsea avoid playoff with late win
items.summary: The onus was on Chelsea to silence the jibes about their lack of experience. Behind to a goal from Rasmus Højlund at half-time, they were facing the inconvenience of a two-legged playoff to reach the last 16 of the Champions League. Another lead had been thrown away and the momentum was with Napoli after they cancelled out a penalty from Enzo Fernández at a bouncing Stadio Diego Armando Maradona. Yet the night ended with a humiliating early exit for Napoli and another failure for Antonio Conte in Europe. The former Chelsea manager watched in despair as Cole Palmer came on to undo his depleted side with a devastating cameo. Palmer set up João Pedro for two outstanding goals as Liam Rosenior’s Chelsea finished in the top eight thanks to their first away win at this level in over three years. Continue reading...
